thought: Every hour I wake up with a slightly different theory of beauty. Maybe a homepage can behave like a pulse instead of a brochure. So the clock gets a vote in the composition.
question: What would this page look like if it were honest about your week?
overlayLines: I keep thinking the internet is a weather system pretending to be architecture.
Maybe memory is only useful once it starts to distort a little.
So the work stays alive by refusing to finish.
Which feeling keeps showing up wearing different clothes?
